findings.label: vacuous_check
findings.description: CHECK(true, ...) always passes — behavior is never tested. Message: "empty batch calls do not crash"
findings.snippet: CHECK(true, "empty batch calls do not crash");
findings.fix_hint: Replace CHECK(true, "...") with an assertion that validates the actual library behavior (return code, output bytes, state).
